final:
module binary_counter_12bit(
    input clk,              // Chip clock signal.
    input reset,            // Synchronous reset signal.
    input enable,           // Enable signal.
    output [11:0] count     // Counter output signal with a data width of 12 bits.
);

reg [11:0] cnt;        // Counter register.

always @(posedge clk)
    if (reset) cnt <= 12'b0;                          // Reset to 0 if reset is active.
    else if (enable) cnt <= cnt + 12'b000000000001; // Increment cnt if enable is active.

assign count = cnt;                                   // Output cnt value.

endmodule
